description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem areas. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, rarray = aareareal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the area subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem areas to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the area quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all areas in the working case.
valid area subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only subsystem areas with at least one ac bus assigned to them.
for subsystem areas with any equipment (ac buses, loads, and/or dc buses) assigned to them.

string.description: Desired net active power interchange leaving the area, in MW.
Interchange tolerance bandwidth, in MW.
Total active power load on buses in the area, in MW.
Total reactive power load on buses in the area, in Mvar.
Total active power load of loads in the area, in MW.
Total reactive power load of loads in the area, in Mvar.
Total active power generation on buses in the area, in MW.
Total reactive power generation on buses in the area, in Mvar.
Total active power losses assigned to the area, in MW.
Total reactive power losses assigned to the area, in Mvar.
Total active power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the area, in MW.
Total reactive power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the area, in MVar.
Total active power net interchange from the area, in MW.
Total reactive power net interchange from the area, in Mvar.
Desired net active power interchange leaving the area (units determined by power output option).
Interchange tolerance bandwidth (units determined by power output option).
Total active power load on buses in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power load on buses in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total active power load of loads in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power load of loads in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total active power generation on buses in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power generation on buses in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total active power losses assigned to the area (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power losses assigned to the area (units determined by power output option).
Total active power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total active power net interchange from the area (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power net interchange from the area (units determined by power output option).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
